title: In the news: AAE's Dumbacher quoted in New York Times story on recent New Glenn launch (subscription required)
summary_en: Although NASA played no role in the recent New Glenn mission, it is counting on Blue Origin to support the Artemis moon program.
title_cn: 新闻动态：《纽约时报》近期新格伦火箭发射相关报道援引航空航天工程系邓巴赫言论（需订阅阅读）

title: April Edition: Newly Issued Patents
summary_en: Congratulations to the Purdue Engineers who recently received patents on their intellectual property from the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office.

title: In the news: Full crew announced for historic 'Purdue 1' suborbital space research mission
summary_en: Purdue University is one small step closer to taking a giant leap into suborbital space - sending an all-Boilermaker crew there next year.
title_cn: 近日要闻：历史性“普渡1号”亚轨道空间研究任务全体乘组名单公布

title: In the news: AAE's Frueh tells TIME about the looming risk of too many satellites and debris in space
summary_en: According to NASA’s Orbital Debris Program Office, more than 25,000 objects larger than 10 cm are currently orbiting Earth, most of them satellites—either active or no longer operating. But that’s only a tiny fraction of the problem. There are 500,000 objects measuring 1 to 10 cm, and 100 million in the 1-mm range.
title_cn: 新闻动态：航空航天工程系弗鲁接受《时代》周刊采访 谈及太空卫星与碎片数量过多的隐现风险

title: ECE's Z. Chen authors 'Birck Builds the Future: Celebrating Twenty Years at Purdue University, 2005-2025'
summary_en: Zhihong Chen, a Reilly Professor of Electrical and Computer Engineering and the Mary Jo and Robert L. Kirk Director of the Birck Nanotechnology Center, and Angie Klink (BA communication '81) published their book 'Birck Builds the Future: Celebrating Twenty Years at Purdue University, 2005-2025.'
title_cn: 电气与计算机工程系Z·陈著《伯尔克筑就未来：庆祝在普渡大学的二十年（2005-2025）》

title: Purdue announces SpaceX team as inaugural laureate of the Neil Armstrong Space Prize
summary_en: The 2026 Neil Armstrong Space Prize was announced Tuesday (April 21) at Purdue University, heralding the Falcon 9 Booster Landing Team for their cutting-edge work on the Falcon 9 reusable two-stage rocket system.
title_cn: 普渡大学宣布太空探索技术公司团队为尼尔·阿姆斯特朗航天奖首届获奖者
